texto: I notice you have the assault proof vest -So it's my fault I guess.So apparently I didn't say 'no' as loud as my clothes could say 'yes.'You see I didn't know that my ‘no’ wasn't enough -I didn't understand that my body became less precious because certain dresses make me look hot.And I guess if I'm wearing the wrong topthen my ‘yes’ is the same as ‘stop.’And you shouldn't have to, just because I begged you to.I'm begging you -Tell me the magic outfit and I'll buy it.Apparently my ‘no’ wasn't heard,even when I screamed.So I need my clothes to be quiet.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Connell sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “I notice you have the assault proof vest -So it's my fault I guess.So apparently I didn't say 'no…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, poem, poetry, útil em momentos de poetry e women-s-rights.
